productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Beige Wallets
description: Urban girls can't get enough of bold accents and this is the key to a memorable look. Update your wardrobe with this stylish wallet from United Colours Of Benetton. Dimensions : 21 cm X 4 cmMade of 100% polyurethane on the outside and 100% polyester for durabilityHas three main compartments with partitionsFour credit card slots on the frontOverlaping flap with four credit card slots and one transparent id card slotZippered compartment on the backButtoned closure and brand name on a mettalic clasp appliqued on the frontCareDo not wash,bleach,iron,dry clean or tumble dryRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
